title: libssh security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.10.4-17]
- Bump spec to resolve build tagging issues

[0.10.4-16]
- Fix CVE-2025-5987
  Resolves: RHEL-130051
- Workaround sshd failure rate limiting in tests
  Resolves: RHEL-135506
full_text:
[0.10.4-17]
- Bump spec to resolve build tagging issues

[0.10.4-16]
- Fix CVE-2025-5987
  Resolves: RHEL-130051
- Workaround sshd failure rate limiting in tests
  Resolves: RHEL-135506
